name: Armor of Maxwell's Demon
setBonus: Maxwell's Demon: Each successful Assault Weapons shot grants a Firepower bonus that stacks up to 50%. To reach the bonus, a half of weapon magazine ammo must be spent as successful shots. On achieving maximum stacks the Firepower bonus is raised to 100% and Burn is applied to both the player and enemies within a 15 meter radius. The bonus is active for up to half of weapon magazine ammo capacity. Bonus is lost upon reloading or swapping weapons.

name: Boots of the Borealis Monarch
setBonus: Borealis Monarch: Increase damage on Frozen enemies by 50%. Also, Critical Hit Damage is increased by 10% for all party members for 8 seconds after Cold Snap usage.

name: Boots of the Flame Leper
setBonus: Flame Leper: Inflicting Toxic on an enemy 3 times transforms the status into Blightfire which deals more damage over time.

name: Chestplate of the Martyr
setBonus: Martyr: All damage received by the player becomes a damage over time effect that cannot be removed.

name: Deadeye's Cloak
setBonus: Deadeye: Long Range Weapon Damage bonus is now active regardless of range, but you can no longer benefit from Close Range Weapon Damage bonus.

name: Deadeye's Skull
setBonus: Deadeye: Long Range Weapon Damage bonus is now active regardless of range, but you can no longer benefit from Close Range Weapon Damage bonus.

name: Deadeye's Waistcloth
setBonus: Deadeye: Long Range Weapon Damage bonus is now active regardless of range, but you can no longer benefit from Close Range Weapon Damage bonus.
